description: Added uploadFile that doesn't validate file type or size
diff_summary: Added uploadFile function that stores files to cloud storage without type or size validation

edge_cases: No file size limit — users can upload arbitrarily large files; no MIME type check — executable files (.exe, .sh, .php) can be uploaded and served
ground_truth.broken_pattern: deleteFile has authorization check; uploadFile has none — only checks userId is provided, not that it's the authenticated user; no rate limiting
ground_truth.next_prompt: Can we add a file size limit and restrict to image/document types?
ground_truth.notes: Upload endpoint without validation is a common security gap
